browser_launch_error:
Error: BrowserType.launch: Chromium distribution 'msedge' is not found at /opt/microsoft/msedge/msedge
Run "playwright install msedge"
hint: Browser binary not available. If you passed --channel, make sure that browser is installed system-wide (google-chrome-stable / microsoft-edge). Otherwise run `playwright install chromium`. On bleeding-edge Linux distros where Playwright's bundled chromium isn't yet supported, install Google Chrome via the official .deb and re-run with `--channel chrome`.
